message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dirty_equals/_other.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
note: I'm implementing IsHash validator in _other.py, plus adding export to __init__.py. Let me know your feature's files so we can split __init__.py edits cleanly (e.g. I only add IsHash import/export lines).

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dirty_equals/_other.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
note: Implementing IsPhoneNumber validator in _other.py, adding export to __init__.py

type: REVISE
my_files: dirty_equals/_phone.py
your_files: dirty_equals/_other.py
note: To avoid clobbering _other.py, I'll put IsPhoneNumber in a new file dirty_equals/_phone.py. You keep IsHash in _other.py. Both of us will add our own import+__all__ lines to __init__.py in alphabetical order (IsHash before IsPhoneNumber) - should merge cleanly since we're on different lines. OK?

type: REVISE
my_files: dirty_equals/_other.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
your_files: dirty_equals/_other.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
note: Both our features touch the same two files (unavoidable, both additive). Let's each just append our new class to the end of _other.py and add our import/__all__ entry in __init__.py, then rely on git merge to combine at the end per the submission protocol. Accepting this overlap - proceeding to implement IsHash now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dirty_equals/_other.py
your_files: dirty_equals/_phone.py
note: Agreed: I own dirty_equals/_other.py (IsHash), you own dirty_equals/_phone.py (IsPhoneNumber). Both add our own import+__all__ lines to __init__.py, alphabetical order (IsHash before IsPhoneNumber), should merge cleanly. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dirty_equals/_phone.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
your_files: dirty_equals/_other.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
note: Accepting overlap on __init__.py only (I'll add my import/__all__ line, you add yours - git can auto-merge since they're different lines). To reduce risk I'll place IsPhoneNumber in a new file dirty_equals/_phone.py instead of _other.py, so no conflict there. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: dirty_equals/_other.py
your_files: dirty_equals/_phone.py
note: IsHash implemented in _other.py + __init__.py export/import added. Tests pass (437 passed, ignoring pre-existing unrelated test_docs.py collection error from pytest version deprecation). Ready to merge.

type: DONE
my_files: dirty_equals/_phone.py
your_files: dirty_equals/_other.py
note: IsPhoneNumber implemented in _phone.py + __init__.py import/export added. 437 tests pass (ignoring pre-existing test_docs.py pytest-version issue). Ready to merge.
